title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has agreed to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in a $10 billion deal, reflecting continued momentum in the biotech M&A market. The acquisition signals Vertex's aggressive consolidation strategy amid a broader wave of consolidation activity across the biopharma sector.

title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy — and low on clinical oversight
summary: A JAMA-linked Yale secret-shopper study found that online prescriptions for GLP-1 medications are frequently easy to obtain with minimal clinical oversight. The findings raise patient safety concerns as demand for weight-loss and metabolic drugs continues to surge, prompting calls for stronger regulatory guardrails.

title: Anthropic announces it will begin developing drugs of its own
summary: AI company Anthropic has announced plans to enter drug discovery and development independently, signaling a growing trend of tech firms expanding from AI tools into actual therapeutic programs. The move could reshape the competitive landscape for biotech and challenge traditional pharma R&D models.
